children.label: a
children.text: Any person insured under who qualifies for a waiver of premiums under is eligible, as provided in this section, for supplemental insurance in an amount not to exceed $30,000.section 1922(a) of this titlesection 1912 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: To qualify for supplemental insurance under this section a person must file with the Secretary an application for such insurance. Such application must be filed not later than (1) , or (2) the end of the one-year period beginning on the date on which the Secretary notifies the person that the person is entitled to a waiver of premiums under , whichever is later. The Secretary may not accept any such application after . Except as provided by section 1922(d)(2)(B), a veteran may not have supplemental insurance under this section and be insured under section 1922B simultaneously.October 31, 1993December 31, 2022section 1912 of this title

children.label: c
children.text: Supplemental insurance granted under this section shall be granted upon the same terms and conditions as insurance granted under , except that such insurance may not be granted to a person under this section unless the application is made for such insurance before the person attains 65 years of age.section 1922(a) of this title

children.label: d
children.text: No waiver of premiums shall be made in the case of any person for supplemental insurance granted under this section.
